scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @remotectrl/api-zod typecheck && pnpm --filter @remotectrl/api-client-react typecheck && pnpm --filter @remotectrl/api-server typecheck && pnpm --filter @remotectrl/mobile typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @remotectrl/api-zod lint && pnpm --filter @remotectrl/api-client-react lint && pnpm --filter @remotectrl/api-server lint && pnpm --filter @remotectrl/mobile lint
